title: TLDef Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function TLDef (ToolNumber As Integer ) As Boolean
parameters: ToolNumber	Integer expression representing which tool to return status for.
description: Returns if a tool is defined.
see_also:
Tool

TlClr

TLDef Example

VB Example:

m_spel.TLDef(1)

C# Example:

m_spel.TLDef(1);
